final:
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    input sel_b2,
    output wire out_assign,
    wire neg_mux_output = (sel_b1&sel_b2);
    assign out_assign = neg_mux_output ? b : a;
    
    always@(*) begin
        if (sel_b1&sel_b2) begin
            out_always = b;
        end
        else begin
            out_always = a;
        end
    end
endmodule
